scope: Profile and theme duplicate PATCH write-flow stability/readback.
expected: Duplicate identical profile/theme updates should not return conflicts or internal errors; final session readback should reflect the submitted profile fields, theme, and normalized accent color.
actual: Pass: two concurrent identical PATCH /api/profile calls returned 200/200; two concurrent identical PATCH /api/profile/theme calls returned 200/200; GET /api/auth/me read back the submitted name/phone/telegram/theme and lower-cased accent color.

verification.command: DATABASE_URL=<local-test-db> node_modules\.bin\vitest.cmd run --config vitest.db.config.ts apps/api/src/app.db.test.ts -t "duplicate profile and theme"
verification.notes: Initial sandbox run failed with spawn EPERM before tests loaded; default DB URL run failed authentication before behavior was exercised; rerun with the local test DB passed. Vitest emitted the existing duplicate assignment.delete warning in packages/domain/src/planning/commandReducer.ts, unrelated to this slice.

coverageImpact: Adds fresh DB/API evidence for profile contact update and theme preference duplicate-submit stability. Broader RISK-WRITE-FLOW-RACE-IDEMPOTENCY remains open for other write surfaces.
